# Authorization Rights Flags

**API Collection**

Recognize the values the Security Server sets in an authorization item’s flag field.

## Overview

Look for these values in the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/flags] field of an [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem], for example among the set of items in the `authorizedRights` parameter returned by a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationCopyInfo(_:_:_:)] function.

## Constants

- **kAuthorizationFlagCanNotPreAuthorize**: Indicates the Security Server could not preauthorizethe right.
